description: Structural parity validation of generated BenchFlow task directories from OpaqueToolsBench BFCL base configs

checks.name: required_files_present
checks.description: task.toml, instruction.md, Dockerfile, test.sh, evaluate.py, ground_truth.json all exist and are non-empty

checks.name: instruction_md_valid
checks.description: instruction.md contains ## Query, ## Available Functions, and output path reference

checks.name: ground_truth_valid
checks.description: ground_truth.json is valid JSON with non-empty ground_truth key

checks.name: test_sh_executable
checks.description: test.sh has executable permission bit set

checks.name: dockerfile_valid
checks.description: Dockerfile contains FROM directive and /logs/verifier directory creation
